expo.description: Expo config plugin options for Android Expo prebuild phase.

variant.description: Your app's build variant, which is constructed from build type and product flavor, e.g. 'debug' or 'freeRelease'.

BrownfieldExpoAndroidConfig.description: Expo config plugin options for Android prebuild scaffolding.

artifactId.description: Maven artifact ID used when publishing the AAR.

compileSdkVersion.description: Compile SDK version for the Android library.

groupId.description: Maven group ID used when publishing the AAR.

minSdkVersion.description: Minimum SDK version for the Android library.

missingDimensionStrategies.description: Missing dimension strategies as dimension + flavor(s), e.g. "type, alpha".

packageName.description: The package name for the Android library module.

targetSdkVersion.description: Target SDK version for the Android library.

useLocalGradlePlugin.description: When true, load the Brownfield Gradle plugin from `@callstack/react-native-brownfield/gradle-plugin/brownfield` via `includeBuild` instead of adding the Maven classpath dependency. Disabled by default.

version.description: Maven version used when publishing the AAR.

BrownfieldExpoIosConfig.description: Expo config plugin options for iOS prebuild scaffolding.

buildSettings.description: Custom build settings applied when building the framework.

bundleIdentifier.description: The bundle identifier for the framework.

deploymentTarget.description: Minimum iOS deployment target for the generated framework.

frameworkVersion.description: Framework version used for Apple build settings.

addSpmPackage.description: When set, generate a local Swift Package Manager manifest next to the packaged XCFramework outputs.

destination.description: Destination(s) for the build. You can pass multiple destinations as separate values or repeated use of the flag. Values can be either: "simulator", "device" or destinations supported by "xcodebuild -destination" flag, e.g. "generic/platform=iOS".

expo.description: Expo config plugin options for iOS Expo prebuild phase.

exportOptionsPlist.description: Export options file name for archiving (default: ExportOptions.plist).

newArch.description: Whether to build in new architecture.

usePrebuiltExpo.description: Set when `--use-prebuilt-expo` is passed; omitted when the flag is absent (Rock applies Expo version defaults).

usePrebuiltRnCore.description: Set when `--use-prebuilt-rn-core` is passed; omitted when the flag is absent (Rock applies RN version defaults).

kotlin.description: The output path to generate Kotlin Brownie store files at.

kotlinPackageName.description: The package name for the Kotlin source code.
